chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding Camels

text: 2483 - قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «إِيَّاكُمْ وَ اَلْإِبِلَ اَلْحُمْرَ فَإِنَّهَا أَقْصَرُ اَلْإِبِلِ أَعْمَاراً».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2483 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Beware of red camels, for they have the shortest lifespan among camels."
